name: auth-nextauth
description: NextAuth credentials provider with role-based access (user/admin), JWT sessions, bcrypt password hashing. Alternative to the hand-rolled JWT in the `authentication` module.

envVars.name: NEXTAUTH_SECRET
envVars.description: Secret used by NextAuth to sign JWTs. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 32

envVars.name: NEXTAUTH_URL
envVars.description: Public URL of the app, used for callbacks. E.g. http://localhost:3000

envVars.name: ADMIN_USERNAME
envVars.description: If set together with ADMIN_PASSWORD, an admin user is auto-seeded on first DB init

envVars.name: ADMIN_PASSWORD
envVars.description: Plain-text password for the auto-seeded admin (hashed before storing)

envVars.name: DATA_DIR
envVars.description: Where the SQLite file lives. Default: ./data

conflictsWith: authentication (uses a different users schema with is_admin instead of role)
postInstall: 2. Optionally set ADMIN_USERNAME and ADMIN_PASSWORD to auto-seed an admin
4. (Optional) Drop in middleware.ts to gate everything except /login
5. The schema is auto-initialized on first DB access — no manual migration needed
6. To gate API routes: const guard = await requireAdmin(); if (guard) return guard;
